final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit barrel shifter that performs right logical shifting when C is 0 and left logical shifting when C is 1.
module top_module(
    input [15:0] A,
    input [3:0] S,
    input C,
    output reg [15:0] B
);always @(*) begin
    if (C == 0) begin
        B = A << S;
    end else begin
        B = A >> S;
    end
end

endmodule
